name: hud_ui_panel_query_text_height
description: HudUiPanel::QueryTextHeight lazily rebuilds dirty text metrics through the panel vtable and returns textHeightPx minus externalLeading.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?QueryTextHeight@HudUiPanel@@QAEHXZ at 0x4bb710 still fails: 24 unmasked mismatches, 0 relocation bytes masked, 7 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 37 bytes and the VC object symbol is 48 bytes. VC6 /O2 /Ob1 /GX gives the same mismatch count, so the remaining drift is local instruction/prologue shape rather than a VC5-vs-VC6 version distinction.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows thiscall, optional virtual call through slot 0x90 when offset 0x270 is nonzero, then return of offsets 0x260 minus 0x274.
The native panel smoke validates the cached path, dirty rebuild path, GetTextRect/HitTest callers, and last-text pointer behavior around this helper.
